rules.expression: (ip.geoip.country in {"US" "CU" "IR" "KP" "SY"}) and (http.request.uri.path contains "/api/polymarket" or http.request.uri.path contains "/trade")

response.content: {"error":"RESTRICTED_JURISDICTION","message":"Regulatory constraint: Access blocked for your jurisdiction."}

rules.description: Rate limit: /api/defi (copy-trading, deposit) — 30 req/minute per IP
Rate limit: Global /api — 300 req/minute per IP

rules.expression: http.request.uri.query contains "UNION SELECT" or http.request.uri.query contains "DROP TABLE" or http.request.uri.query contains "' OR '1'='1" or http.request.body contains "UNION SELECT"
http.request.uri.path contains "../" or http.request.uri.path contains "..\\" or http.request.uri.path contains "%2e%2e"

http.user_agent contains "sqlmap" or http.user_agent contains "nikto" or http.user_agent contains "nmap" or http.user_agent contains "masscan" or http.user_agent contains "nuclei" or http.user_agent contains "gobuster" or http.user_agent contains "dirbuster" or http.user_agent contains "acunetix" or http.user_agent contains "burpsuite"
not http.request.headers["user-agent"] exists and http.request.uri.path wildcard "/api/*"

rules.description: Enforce HTTPS — redirect HTTP to HTTPS

rules.expression: http.request.uri.path contains "/wp-admin" or http.request.uri.path contains "/wp-login" or http.request.uri.path contains "/phpmyadmin" or http.request.uri.path eq "/.env" or http.request.uri.path contains "/config.php"

rules.description: Challenge TOR exit nodes and anonymous proxies
Block oversized request bodies on sensitive write routes (>1MB)
rules.expression: (http.request.uri.path wildcard "/api/defi/*" or http.request.uri.path eq "/api/user/nuke" or http.request.uri.path eq "/api/verify-human") and http.request.body.size > 1000000

rules.description: Managed OWASP Core Ruleset — CRS v3.3

_meta.deploy_instructions: Cloudflare Dashboard → Security → WAF → Custom rules → Import JSON. Or use Cloudflare API: PUT /zones/{zone_id}/rulesets/{ruleset_id}/rules
